title: Partition by with multi-column
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.ranked_within_team_and_category/0` that ranks posts using `row_number() |> over(partition_by: [p.category_id, u.team_id], order_by: [desc: p.view_count])`. Join on the author to get `u.team_id`. Select `{p.id, p.title, rank}`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multi-column partition with a joined binding. Non-obvious that `partition_by:` takes a list.
